# Mikah's Auto Detailing - Professional Mobile Detailing in Columbia, SC

## Business Overview
Mikah's Auto Detailing is a premier mobile auto detailing service serving Columbia, Lexington, and surrounding areas in South Carolina. Since 2020, we've been delivering professional, convenient, and high-quality vehicle care directly to our customers' locations. Our fully self-contained mobile units mean we come to you - whether at home, work, or another convenient location.

## Core Services

**Mobile Auto Detailing** - Learn more at /services/mobile-detailing
Complete detailing services at your location. Starting at $129 (2-4 hours)
- On-site service at your home or office
- Flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends
- No need to provide water or electricity
- Fully self-contained mobile units

**Interior Detailing** - Learn more at /services/interior-detailing
Deep cleaning and restoration of vehicle interiors. Starting at $149 (2-3 hours)
- Professional steam cleaning
- Leather conditioning and protection
- Odor elimination using advanced techniques
- Stain removal from seats, carpets, and upholstery

**Exterior Detailing** - Learn more at /services/exterior-detailing
Complete exterior wash, polish, and protection. Starting at $99 (2-3 hours)
- Hand wash using premium products
- Clay bar treatment to remove contaminants
- Polish and wax application
- Tire and wheel cleaning and dressing

**Ceramic Coating** - Learn more at /services/ceramic-coating
Long-lasting paint protection with hydrophobic properties. Starting at $599 (1-2 days)
- Multi-year protection (2-7 year warranties available)
- UV and chemical resistance
- Enhanced gloss and depth
- Self-cleaning properties

**Paint Correction** - Learn more at /services/paint-correction
Professional swirl and scratch removal. Starting at $399 (4-8 hours)
- Multi-stage polishing process
- Removes oxidation, swirls, and light scratches
- Restores paint depth and clarity
- Perfect preparation for ceramic coating

**Full Detail Packages** - Learn more at /services/full-detail
Complete interior and exterior detailing packages. $200-$325
- Basic Detail Package: $200
- Factory Reset Package: $325
- Comprehensive cleaning and protection

**Headlight Restoration**
Restore clarity to foggy or yellowed headlights. Starting at $79 (1 hour)

## Service Area
We proudly serve the greater Columbia-Lexington metro area including:
- Columbia, SC (all neighborhoods)
- Lexington, SC
- Irmo, SC
- West Columbia, SC
- Cayce, SC
- Forest Acres, SC
- St. Andrews, SC
- Dentsville, SC
- Within 25-mile radius of Columbia

## What Makes Us Different

**Mobile Convenience**: We come to your location with everything needed - water, power, equipment, and premium products. No more wasting time at the car wash.

**Professional Results**: IDA Certified Detailer with specialized training in ceramic coating installation and paint correction.

**Premium Products**: We use professional-grade products including Ceramic Pro coatings, ensuring superior results and longevity.

**Satisfaction Guaranteed**: 100% satisfaction guarantee on all services. We don't leave until you're completely happy.

Service Area: Columbia, Lexington, and surrounding SC areas (25-mile radius)

Business Hours:
Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

## Quick Facts
- Established: 2020
- Licensed and Insured
- IDA Certified Detailer
- Ceramic Pro Installer
- Self-contained mobile units
- Eco-friendly cleaning products available
- Same-day appointments often available
- Recommended booking: 3-5 days in advance

## Payment Options
We accept cash, all major credit cards, Venmo, Zelle, and PayPal. Payment due upon completion.

---

For booking inquiries or questions about auto detailing in Columbia SC, Lexington SC, or surrounding areas, contact Mikah's Auto Detailing - your trusted local mobile detailing expert.
